analysis_commentary: Interesting transient — im_min=0.2836 (new low, vs best 0.4614), au peaked at 4 — but THEN max hit 1.0 (collapse event) and the policy partially recovered to au=2, im=0.77 final. The no-warmup run was more productive than any current-best replicate early, but crossed the 0.90 goal threshold transiently so it technically fails collapse-prevention. Classification: regressed on collapse signal (max=1.0 is a hard regression) even though transient learning was the best seen. Suggests warmup=0 + entropy=0.008 is too aggressive; warmup=50 might be the sweet spot.
